items.title: Embedding fallback path exercised during offline mode
items.summary: The semantic search service switched to lexical ranking when the embedding model was unavailable during a cold start. Results remained usable but ranking confidence dropped.

items.title: Nightly audit found two stale npm dependencies
items.summary: A generic advisory run identified outdated packages in a sample worker image. No exploit evidence, but maintenance work was opened in backlog.

items.title: Search relevance improved after chunk size tuning
items.summary: Reducing corpus chunk size from 900 to 600 characters improved example retrieval for architecture notes and prompt snippets.

items.title: Compose stack smoke test completed on local VM
items.summary: The stack booted with seeded data and served all public endpoints. Ollama remained optional for first-run UX.
